{
  "utterance": "We will build a platform that uses AI to empower the visually impaired community by providing real-time object recognition and navigation assistance, transforming their daily lives.",
  "title": "SightBridge",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "SightBridge leverages cutting-edge AI to provide tangible, measurable social impact by improving the quality of life for the visually impaired, addressing a critical social issue.",
